questionHtml:
Sound of frequency 2400 Hz is emitted from a stationary source towards the oscillating plate in (b). The speed of sound is 340 m s−1.

Determine the maximum frequency of the sound that is received back at the source after reflection at the plate.
markschemeHtml:
frequency at plate 2400×340+19.6340«=2538 Hz»

at source 2538×340340-19.6=2694≈2700 «Hz» ✓

 

Award [2] marks for a bald correct answer.

Award [1] mark when the effect is only applied once.

meta.title: Sound of frequency 2400 Hz is emitted from a stationary source towards the oscillating plate in (b). The speed of sound is 340 m s−1. Determine the maximum frequency of the sound t
